title: Rostov-on-Don、Rostov Oblast — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Rostov-on-Don、Rostov Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Rostov-on-Don是Rostov Oblast的一個城市，人口約1,130,000。The capital of Southern Russia, a bustling port city on the Don River with a rich Cossack heritage and vibrant cultural life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
